creator: info@educatia.de
text:
Request for Educatia.de link at the FreeBSD website http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html with the following content:


http://www.Educatia.de

Educatia is a Germany based Portal for IT trainings and Seminars for Germany, Austria and Switzerland.
Educatia offers FreeBSD trainings for overview and advanced users as well as a large selection of other open source technologies. 
For further information see http://www.educatia.de/training/opensource-betriebssysteme/freebsd.php
